name: linInvertRespBit
title: linInvertRespBit
syntax: dword linInvertRespBit (long frameID, dword byteIndex, dword bitIndex)
description: This function inverts the specified bit when the next bus event for the specified ID occurs, provided that the bus event contains the specified data byte.

parameters.name: frameID
parameters.description: ID of the bus event to be manipulated.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.

description: Invert response bits on keyboard event
